Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}You didn't invite anyone else, did you? Wait, what am I saying...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Sorry, I'm having some trouble remaining calm. I'll let you decide where we should go...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to spend[n]Christmas Eve with Mitsuru...[n]{f 1 1}
